metadata.command: cd /testbed/astropy && python setup.py build_ext --inplace && python -c "from astropy.modeling import models as m; from astropy.modeling.separable import separability_matrix; print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))); print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & (m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))))"
